description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard box, commonly used for shipping or storage. The front face features a large, roughly cut rectangular opening with a small green humanoid figurine sitting on the lower edge of the cutout. Handwritten text in black marker reads 'HIVE DRIVE' and 'HERE' on the front, with additional writing and a barcode label visible on the top. The box is sealed with clear packing tape along the top seam, and the back face has a small circular hole. The cardboard surface shows typical corrugation and some wear, with visible creases and tape marks. The overall appearance suggests it has been reused or repurposed, possibly for a creative or playful function.
description: A medium cardboard box with a cutout window, handwritten text, and a small green figurine on the front. The box is taped shut and shows signs of use.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large cutout window, handwritten text, and a green figurine sitting on the edge of the opening.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the taped seam and barcode label, with no cutouts or figurines visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a small circular hole and additional handwritten text, with no cutout window or figurine.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing the taped seam and plain cardboard surface.
